mapper.select: select count(*) from qlist where status = 'Y'
SELECT q.*, m.nickname AS writer FROM qlist q JOIN member m ON q.member_no = m.member_no WHERE q.status = 'Y' ORDER BY q.create_date DESC
SELECT q.*, m.nickname AS writer FROM qlist q JOIN member m ON q.member_no = m.member_no WHERE q.q_no = #{qNo} AND q.status = 'Y'
